purpose: Durable instructions for parsing reminder inputs into task JSON.
rules: If the UI sends category or is_recurring, treat those values as the user's explicit choice.
Do not infer Travel, Office, or Home just because an item could belong there. Use those categories only when the user says the category or the UI sends it.
One-time reminders must stay one-time even when the title contains travel, office, or home words.
Recurring reminders are created only when the user says every day, daily, each day, routine, or when the UI sends is_recurring true.
The title must be the clean action only. Remove time words, category words, and command words like remind me, add, create, set, schedule.
Spoken times like 11 30 mean 11:30, not title suffix 30.
Relative phrases like after 2 minutes mean now plus that duration.

examples.input: travel reminder passport every day at 8 AM
